title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.655 - Tax exemption for property and income of authority
text:
67.655.  Tax exemption for property and income of authority. — The income of the authority and all properties at any time owned by the authority shall be exempt from all taxation in the state of Missouri.  For the purposes of section 409.402, all bonds issued by the authority shall be deemed to be securities issued by a public instrumentality of the state of Missouri.
(L. 1988 H.B. 1144)
